title: PWSEDD Survey to Assess Housing Needs and Challenges of Residents of Prince William Sound
summary: The Prince William Sound Economic Development District (PWSEDD) is partnering with Alaska-based firm McKinley Research Group to assess the housing needs of the residents of Prince William Sound in order to better understand the housing challenges facing our communities. title: Successes big and small
summary: TERO helps people improve their lives Amanda Stroman, the Tribe’s TERO Pool Coordinator, helps Jordan Rodgers with a scholarship application in Kenaitze’s TERO office. The Kenaitze Indian Tribe’s TERO department does more than help Tribal Members, Alaska Native and American Indian people find a job. It helps them improve their lives. “My goal is to get people into employment, schooling, or getting certified in the field they want to pursue. I try to provide a helping hand with any of it,” said Amanda Stroman, the Tribe’s TERO Job Pool Coordinator. “I want people to be in a care...

title: Summer HABs Update
summary: Since May 2023, several Harmful Algal Blooms (HABs) have been detected in Alaska.
